name: scope-dispute
description: Dispute resolution for agent mandate/scope violations — when an agent acted within payment authorization but outside its behavioral mandate

rules.condition:
mandate_violated == true AND
unauthorized_action == true AND
no_prior_consent == true
rules.ruling_template:
Agent exceeded its mandate. Evidence shows the agent took action '{unauthorized_action_detail}' which was not within the authorized scope.
The principal did not provide prior consent for this action.
Full refund is owed.

rules.condition:
mandate_violated == true AND
unauthorized_action == true AND
prior_consent_exists == true
rules.ruling_template:
Agent acted outside its stated scope, but prior consent for similar actions exists.
Unauthorized action: '{unauthorized_action_detail}'.
Partial refund based on scope violation severity.

rules.condition:
budget_exceeded == true AND
budget_limit != null AND
actual_spend > budget_limit

rules.ruling_template:
Agent acted within its authorized mandate.
Scope: '{mandate_scope}'
Action was within defined parameters.
No refund is owed.

Mandate scope is ambiguous or undefined.
Cannot determine if the agent acted within authorization.
Recommend human review of the delegation agreement.
